name: National Credit Care
description_short: National Credit Care is a Tempe, AZ-based credit repair firm. BBB A+ accredited. 2,180 Google reviews. Nationwide service with professional dispute services.
description_long:
National Credit Care is a BBB A+-accredited credit repair firm based in Tempe, Arizona, serving consumers nationwide. The company has approximately 2,180 Google reviews and specializes in credit report disputes, credit building strategies, and financial education.

Services include credit report analysis across all three bureaus, dispute filing for inaccurate items, debt validation, credit monitoring guidance, and personalized credit-building plans. The BBB A+ accreditation indicates reliable business practices and effective complaint resolution.

As with all credit repair firms, consumers should understand legal limitations. Compare pricing against established providers and consider DIY dispute options through AnnualCreditReport.com.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee was identified on their website. Contact provider for current terms.

tiers.name: Credit Repair Service
features: FCRA-based dispute submissions to all three major bureaus
Direct credit bureau contact on client's behalf

pros: 4.6/5 Google rating from 2,180 reviews — among the stronger consumer satisfaction signals in the credit repair industry
Founded ~2009 with approximately 17 years of credit repair experience
No long-term contracts — clients can cancel at any time without penalty
100% US-based staff with no offshore outsourcing
Mobile app available on both iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play)
Separate client portal and lender portal for mortgage professionals
Disputes submitted to all three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
cons: Not BBB accredited; BBB formally identified a pattern of complaints in June 2021 related to billing, collection activities, and customer service
$179 setup fee plus $89/month places it at a moderate-to-premium price point compared to some competitors
No money-back guarantee found on website or in verified third-party sources
No NFCC, HUD-approved, or non-profit status — this is a for-profit credit repair firm, not a free counseling resource
No publicly verified data on average results, typical timeline to dispute resolution, or success rates
best_for: Consumers nationwide seeking BBB A+-accredited credit repair
Individuals with credit report errors needing dispute assistance
People preparing for mortgage applications who need credit improvement
diagnosis: National Credit Care benefits from BBB A+ accreditation and nationwide service. The 2,180 Google reviews indicate established operations. Compare against The Credit People ($79/mo) and other BBB A+ accredited firms.
services: Credit report analysis and initial consultation
FCRA-based dispute submissions to Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion
Removal of inaccurate or incomplete items from credit reports
Removal of unverifiable negative items via bureau investigation process
Direct communication with credit bureaus on client's behalf
iOS and Android mobile app for client account management
Online client portal for account access and progress tracking
Lender portal for mortgage professionals working with clients
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
